overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V depicting a morning walk along a wet coastal beach, transitioning onto a wooden pier between white beach bungalows, ascending to a convenience store area, and continuing along a coastal road lined with parked vehicles. The environment features clear skies with wet ground suggesting recent rainfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach shoreline transitioning to wooden pier

events.description: steps from sandy beach onto wooden pier structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the shoreline and stepping onto the wooden pier deck

entered.detail: calm blue ocean water extending to the horizon
wet sand along the shoreline with gentle waves
elevated beach houses built on wooden pilings above the sand dune
weathered wooden planks forming the pier walkway
white wooden beach bungalows with blue trim lining the pier

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide sandy beach with calm ocean waters on the left and elevated beach houses on stilts to the right. The camera walks forward, transitioning from the sand onto a wooden pier deck. The weather is clear and sunny, with wet sand reflecting the morning light.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden pier walkway between beach bungalows

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet wooden pier corridor between rows of white beach bungalows

entered.detail: small white tower with red roof at the end of the pier structure
wooden staircase leading upward from the pier deck

segments.scene_description: Walking along the enclosed wooden pier corridor between white beach bungalows with blue trim. The wooden deck is wet and reflective. The beach and ocean are now behind as the camera approaches a watch tower and staircase at the end of the pier.

events.description: begins ascending wooden stairs from pier level to upper street

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden stairs flanked by white railings between the beach bungalows

entered.detail: white painted wooden railings lining both sides of the staircase
single-story convenience store with brick facade and green signage visible at top of stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a wooden staircase between the white beach bungalows, with white railings on both sides. At the top of the stairs, a convenience store with a brick facade becomes visible, marking the transition from the pier to the upper street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: convenience store parking lot and sidewalk

events.description: emerges from wooden pier structure onto asphalt parking lot and sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking past the convenience store and through the parking area toward the coastal road

notable_agents.action: white jeep parked in front of the convenience store

entered.detail: white jeep wrangler parked near the store entrance
blue and black trash bins along the sidewalk
asphalt road running parallel to the coastline
rocky cliff face with sparse vegetation rising beside the road

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the pier structure into a parking lot area with a convenience store featuring green signage and a white jeep parked out front. The camera walks along the sidewalk past trash bins and vending machines, transitioning to a coastal road with a rocky hillside on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal residential road with parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking along the coastal road passing various parked SUVs and beach houses

notable_agents.action: yellow hummer parked along the curb

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the rocky hillside
wooden utility poles with power lines running along the road
wooden and stucco beach houses with garages facing the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along the wet asphalt coastal road lined with parked SUVs and beach houses on the left, and a rocky hillside with palm trees on the right. Utility poles run along the road, and the ocean is visible in the distance beyond the houses.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that begins on a reflective sandy beach and ascends toward a coastal road. It begins by walking across wet sand beside calm ocean waters before transitioning onto a wooden pier deck flanked by white beach bungalows with blue trim. As the camera moves through the enclosed pier corridor, it ascends a wooden staircase with white railings, shifting the perspective from the shoreline up toward a brick-facade convenience store. The scene then opens into a parking lot area with green signage and a white jeep, moving past vending machines and trash bins to reach the street level. Finally, the camera proceeds along a wet asphalt road lined with parked SUVs and utility poles, positioned between a rocky hillside with palm trees and the distant ocean.
